name: Flooding escalation
mitigation: Pre-position supplies in elevated districts; daily flood monitoring

name: Supply chain disruption
mitigation: Multiple suppliers; 4-week buffer stock; alternative routes

name: Security incidents
mitigation: Security risk assessments; coordination with local authorities

name: Donor funding delays
mitigation: Bridge funding from internal reserves; weekly cash flow forecast

name: Data quality issues
mitigation: Daily data quality audits; supervisor spot checks
